parsedJson.summary: The site has a clear roofing message and some useful trust claims, but the mobile view hides the main contact action and the desktop header makes the phone number hard to read.

issues.title: No phone or quote button on mobile
issues.what_observed: In the mobile screenshot, the top of the page shows only the large Ace Roofing Service logo, then the hero text; there is no visible phone button or quote button above the fold.
issues.why_problem: A Google-searching Brisbane customer is often trying to call quickly, especially for roof leaks or urgent repairs. If they cannot see a tap-to-call action immediately, they may go back to the search results and call another roofer.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile header with a compact logo and a sticky tap-to-call button visible at the top, plus a second quote button directly under the main headline.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce the mobile logo height, add a sticky bottom or top phone CTA reading 'Call 0426 366 7xx', and place a 'Get Free Quote' button directly below the hero headline.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机版首屏看不到电话号码或报价按钮，客户想联系你时要自己往下找。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索很多发生在手机上，常见行为是看几秒就决定打给谁。找不到一键拨号会直接流失急单，尤其是漏水、风暴损坏这类高价值客户。

issues.title: Phone number appears cut off
issues.what_observed: In the desktop header, the blue phone button shows '0426 366 7...' with the final digits hidden or cropped.
issues.why_problem: A visitor may worry the site is unfinished or may not be able to copy the number accurately. For a local trade business, an unclear phone number immediately weakens trust and makes calling harder.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A full phone number displayed in one line with enough button width, strong contrast, and no ellipsis.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Widen the desktop phone button and set the phone text to never truncate; use a clear label such as 'Call 0426 366 7xx' with a phone icon.
issues.plain_explanation: 桌面版顶部电话号码被省略号截断，看起来像网站没做好。
issues.customer_impact: 电话号码是本地服务网站最重要的入口之一。号码显示不完整会让客户犹豫或无法拨打，直接减少电话询盘。

issues.title: Mobile headline overwhelms screen
issues.what_observed: On mobile, the headline takes most of the visible screen height and wraps into many short lines before any contact action appears.
issues.why_problem: A phone visitor has to work through a long sales line before seeing what to do next. This slows down decision-making when the customer mainly wants to know whether the roofer is local, trustworthy, and easy to contact.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A shorter mobile headline in 32-40px type, followed immediately by one sentence of service detail and a visible call or quote button.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rewrite the mobile hero to 'Brisbane Roof Repairs & Restoration' with a smaller support line about licensed, insured service and 10-year protection, then show phone and quote CTAs.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机版标题太长太大，客户第一眼看到的是一大段字，而不是联系方式。
issues.customer_impact: 访客通常在几秒内判断是否继续看。首屏信息太挤会让人更快离开，特别是从 Google 商家资料点进来的手机用户。

issues.title: Roof image is overly dark
issues.what_observed: The hero background is a very dark roof photo with a heavy navy overlay, making the actual roofing work hard to inspect.
issues.why_problem: Customers hiring a roofer want visual proof that the business does real, quality work. A dark image feels more like a generic template than evidence of local roofing results.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A brighter real project photo showing a clean Brisbane roof, with the text placed on a controlled dark panel or gradient only where needed for readability.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the current dark hero image with a sharp completed-roof project photo and use a lighter overlay limited to the text area.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页背景图太暗，看不清屋顶，也看不出施工质量。
issues.customer_impact: 客户花钱修屋顶时很看重真实案例。图片像模板或看不清，会降低信任，让客户更倾向选择看起来更真实的同行。

issues.title: Angled logo block feels dated
issues.what_observed: The desktop header places the logo inside a large white angled block that cuts diagonally into the hero image.
issues.why_problem: The unusual angled shape draws attention away from the phone and quote actions. It can also make the design feel older than the actual business.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A simple horizontal header with compact logo on the left and phone/quote buttons aligned on the right, using consistent spacing.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the angled white logo panel with a clean sticky header bar, keeping the logo smaller and the contact actions visually dominant.
issues.plain_explanation: 桌面版左上角斜切的大白色区域很抢眼，让页面看起来有点旧。
issues.customer_impact: 客户会用网站外观判断公司是否专业、是否还在正常经营。首屏设计显旧，会削弱信任感，影响询盘。

issues.title: Trust points are scattered
issues.what_observed: The desktop hero lists many checkmark claims across two columns, including licensed, insured, family-owned, emergency needs, and 20 years expertise.
issues.why_problem: The useful proof is present, but it is buried in a long list. A local customer scanning quickly may miss the strongest reasons to trust the business.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Three compact trust badges near the CTA: 'Licensed & Insured', '20+ Years Experience', and 'Emergency Roofing 24/7', followed by a short service line.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Condense the checklist into three high-priority badges directly under the CTA, then move secondary claims lower on the page.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面有很多可信信息，但排成一长串，重点不够突出。
issues.customer_impact: 客户不会仔细读完所有项目。把最强的信任点放在按钮旁边，能更快打消顾虑，增加电话和报价请求。

positive_observations: The business name and roofing category are clear in both desktop and mobile screenshots.
The blue accent color gives the phone and '10 Years' promise strong visibility.
The page already includes useful trust claims such as licensed, insured, family-owned, and emergency availability.
redesign_priorities: 1. Add visible mobile tap-to-call and quote CTAs above the fold.
2. Fix the desktop header so the full phone number is readable and contact actions dominate.
3. Replace the dark generic hero treatment with a brighter real roofing project image and three focused trust badges.
